steps.title: Expand and collect terms
steps.content: $x(r-7)+3=17x+25$ expands to $xr-7x+3=17x+25$. Subtracting $17x$ and $3$ gives $xr-24x=22$, or $x(r-24)=22$.

steps.title: Find when there is exactly one solution
steps.content: This equation is linear in $x$ with coefficient $r-24$. It has exactly one solution when $r-24\ne 0$, so $r\ne 24$. If $r=24$, the equation becomes $0=22$, which has no solution.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content:
• 3 gives $r-24=-21$, so the equation has exactly one solution.
  • 7 gives $r-24=-17$, so the equation has exactly one solution.
  • 22 gives $r-24=-2$, so the equation has exactly one solution.
  • 24 gives $r-24=0$, so the equation becomes $0=22$ and has no solution.
The value that cannot give exactly one solution is D.
